hyperedges.label: Shopify Outbound Push Routes (POS to Shopify)
Shopify Inbound Webhook Routes (Shopify to POS)
Settings configuration sub-area
hyperedges.summary: All /settings/* sub-pages providing system configuration: data backup/restore, CSV/vCard imports, payment method CRUD, Zebra label designer, and WePrint SKU selection.

hyperedges.label: Domain entry forms (react-hook-form + zod)
hyperedges.summary: All domain CRUD forms share react-hook-form + zodResolver pattern, use shadcn Form/FormField components, and dispatch through useAppStore mutations.

hyperedges.label: Auth wrapping layer
hyperedges.summary: Top-level auth wrappers: GoogleAuthGate enforces Firebase Google sign-in with email allowlist; AuthorizationProvider is a stub for future role-based gating.

hyperedges.label: App layout chain
hyperedges.summary: Outer-to-inner shell: GoogleAuthGate -> AuthorizationProvider -> MainApp (hydration/settings/products bootstrap) -> AppLayout (sidebar + nav).

hyperedges.label: Public printable invoice view
hyperedges.summary: Standalone /view-invoice/[id] route with its own minimal layout that escapes the main sidebar; fetches data directly from Firestore for sharable PDF rendering.

hyperedges.label: Data import pipeline
hyperedges.summary: CSV/JSON/vCard ingestion endpoints: contacts from CSV/vCard, hisaab ledger entries from CSV, and full collection backup/restore.

hyperedges.label: Core business logic
hyperedges.summary: The financial/state backbone: Zustand store mediates between UI and Firestore (client SDK) using shared money math; firebase-admin provides the parallel server-side path used by API routes & scripts.

hyperedges.label: Invoice pricing pipeline
hyperedges.summary: Karat rate lookup -> per-metal cost -> product cost -> cart subtotal -> invoice grand total with exchange & adjustments.

hyperedges.label: Zustand persistence + Firestore listeners
hyperedges.summary: Persist middleware + per-collection onSnapshot listeners stream Firestore docs into Immer-managed state slices.

hyperedges.label: Zebra label printing subsystem
hyperedges.summary: Layout-driven ZPL generation and Browser Print bridge; tag formats and print history live in the store.

hyperedges.label: Notification subsystem
hyperedges.summary: Order changes hit /api/notifications/send which delegates to WhatsApp/scheduler.

nodes.label: Extract Python value from Firestore field value dict.
nodes.norm_label: extract python value from firestore field value dict.

nodes.label: Fix Tahera order via Firestore REST
nodes.norm_label: fix tahera order via firestore rest

nodes.label: Convert hisaab Timestamp to ISO string
nodes.norm_label: convert hisaab timestamp to iso string

nodes.label: External: Firebase project hom-pos (House of Mina)
nodes.norm_label: external: firebase project hom-pos (house of mina)

nodes.label: Settings: Backups
nodes.summary: Export/import Firestore collections (products, customers, karigars, orders, invoices, hisaab, expenses, additional_revenue, karigar_batches, given_items, categories, sold_products) as JSON backups; tracks last export via localStorage.

nodes.label: Settings: Contact Import
nodes.summary: Imports customers from CSV or vCard files using Papa-parse and vcard-parser; previews parsed rows before committing to the customer collection.

nodes.label: Settings: Hisaab Import
nodes.summary: Imports hisaab/ledger entries (cashIn/cashOut) from CSV against a selected customer or karigar entity.

nodes.label: Settings: Payment Methods
nodes.summary: CRUD for store PaymentMethod records (Pakistani banks list, account name/number, IBAN). Generates QR codes for payment details.

nodes.label: Settings: Printer (Zebra)
nodes.summary: Designs ZPL label layouts for Zebra 2000T jewellery tag (83x37mm); supports text/QR fields with positioning, rotation, and font configuration.

nodes.label: Settings: WePrint API
nodes.summary: Selects which product SKUs are exposed via the WePrint integration; stores selected SKUs in app settings (settings.weprintApiSkus).

nodes.label: View-Invoice Layout
nodes.summary: Minimal pass-through layout (fragment) that bypasses the main app sidebar so the invoice page renders as a clean public-facing view.

nodes.label: View Invoice (public)
nodes.summary: Public invoice viewer that loads invoice/customer/settings directly from Firestore (no app store), renders printable summary and downloads PDF via jsPDF + autotable.

nodes.label: Offline Page
nodes.summary: PWA offline fallback page rendered by the service worker when the user is disconnected.

nodes.label: GoogleAuthGate
nodes.summary: Top-level auth gate using Firebase GoogleAuthProvider; enforces an allowlist (STORE_CONFIG.allowedEmails), logs sign-ins to 'signInLogs' collection with browser/OS info, and exposes useAuth() context.

nodes.label: AuthorizationProvider
nodes.summary: Stub provider that currently just renders children; placeholder for future role-based authorization wrapping.

nodes.label: CustomerAutocomplete
nodes.summary: Type-ahead input that filters a Customer[] list, supports selecting a customer (id/name/phone) or 'Walk-in Customer'.

nodes.label: CustomerForm
nodes.summary: react-hook-form + zod form for creating/editing Customer records (name, phone via PhoneInput, email, address); supports redirect_to_hisaab query.

nodes.label: ExpenseForm
nodes.summary: Form for adding/editing Expense (date, category from EXPENSE_CATEGORIES, description, amount). Supports lockedKarigarId/lockedBatchId to attach the expense to a specific karigar hisaab batch.

nodes.label: KarigarForm
nodes.summary: react-hook-form + zod form for creating/editing Karigar (name required, contact via PhoneInput, notes); supports redirect_to_hisaab query.

nodes.label: AppLayout
nodes.summary: Sidebar shell layout grouping nav into Overview, Point of Sale, Management, Finance, System; uses useAuth() for user info, links to all pages.

nodes.label: MainApp
nodes.summary: Hydration/loading wrapper. Waits for store rehydration + settings load, kicks off products real-time listener, and runs useGoldRatesSync once-per-day fetch.

nodes.label: OrderForm
nodes.summary: Large multi-item custom Order builder using useFieldArray. Each item has karat/metalType/weight/wastage/making/diamond/stone/manualPrice fields with calculateProductCosts integration; renders invoice PDF via jsPDF + autotable + QRCode; uses CustomerAutocomplete.

nodes.label: ProductForm
nodes.summary: Form for creating/editing Product with primary+secondary metal, karat, weights, wastage, making/diamond/stone/misc charges, image upload to Firebase Storage, and isCustomPrice override.

nodes.label: QrScanner
nodes.summary: Html5Qrcode-based camera scanner with viewfinder overlay, zoom slider, and beep audio feedback on successful scan.

nodes.label: AlertDialog
nodes.summary: Radix UI AlertDialog primitives (Root, Trigger, Content, Header, Footer, Title, Description, Action, Cancel) styled with Tailwind/buttonVariants.

nodes.label: DateRangePicker
nodes.summary: Popover + Calendar (range mode, 2 months) for selecting a DateRange; formats display via date-fns.

nodes.label: ui/swipe-to-delete.tsx
nodes.note: Custom (non-shadcn) touch swipe-left-to-reveal-delete component; desktop unchanged

nodes.label: ui/form.tsx
nodes.note: Form provider used by all entity forms (react-hook-form integration)

nodes.label: useGoldRatesSync
nodes.note: Once-per-day device sync; fetches /api/gold-rates and writes to Firestore settings via store

nodes.label: useAppReady / useIsStoreHydrated
nodes.note: Central hook for hydration/readiness wrapping zustand store; used by every page

nodes.label: lib/gold-update.ts
nodes.note: Fetches gold spot + USD/PKR; Gemini-grounded WhatsApp market update for Investments by Taheri

nodes.label: lib/firebase.ts
nodes.note: Firebase client init; env-driven config with silver-store fallback; exports app/auth/db

nodes.label: lib/csv.ts
nodes.note: Product CSV import/export helpers (paired tag rows for two-up label printing)

nodes.label: lib/store-config.ts
nodes.note: Multi-tenant config (silver vs gold store) driven entirely by NEXT_PUBLIC_STORE_* env vars

nodes.label: lib/utils.ts
nodes.note: cn() classname merger; openPDFWindowForIOS / savePDF iOS PDF helpers; normalizePhoneNumber

nodes.label: src/lib/financials.ts
nodes.summary: Pure-function helpers for invoice money math: totals, exchange totals, adjustments, restored placeholder detection.

nodes.label: isRestoredPlaceholderOrder
nodes.summary: Detects orders restored from activity log via marker in notes.

nodes.label: getInvoiceExchangeTotal
nodes.summary: Sum of exchangeAmount1 + exchangeAmount2.

nodes.label: getInvoiceAdjustmentsAmount
nodes.summary: Returns invoice.adjustmentsAmount or 0.

nodes.label: getInvoiceExpectedGrandTotal
nodes.summary: subtotal - discount - exchange + adjustments.

nodes.label: adminDb
nodes.summary: Exported admin.firestore() instance for server-side use (API routes, scripts).

nodes.label: src/lib/whatsapp.ts
nodes.summary: Server-only WhatsApp messaging via Meta Graph API v22.0.

nodes.label: sendWhatsAppMessage
nodes.summary: Sends a WhatsApp text message using WHATSAPP_TOKEN and WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID env vars.

nodes.label: src/lib/zebra-printer.ts
nodes.summary: Client-side ZPL generation and Zebra Browser Print integration for thermal label printing.

nodes.label: LabelField
nodes.summary: Layout field: text or qr with x/y/rotation/data and styling.

nodes.label: LabelLayout
nodes.summary: Tag layout: id/name/widthDots/heightDots/fields[].

nodes.label: generateZplFromLayout
nodes.summary: Renders ZPL string from structured layout, replacing {placeholder} tokens.

nodes.label: generateDumbbellTagZpl
nodes.summary: Quick ZPL for a single SKU on a dumbbell tag (664x296 dots).

nodes.label: checkZebraBrowserPrint
nodes.summary: Pings http://127.0.0.1:9100/available and resolves the default printer device.

nodes.label: sendZplToPrinter
nodes.summary: Sends ZPL to default Zebra device via window.Zebra; auto-runs setup if needed.

nodes.label: src/lib/store.ts
nodes.summary: Main Zustand store (with immer + persist). Central app state for settings, products, customers, karigars, invoices, orders, hisaab, expenses, silver transactions, given items, activity log. Provides ~70 actions and many Firestore listeners. God-node.

nodes.label: FIRESTORE_COLLECTIONS
nodes.summary: Names of all Firestore collections used by the app.

nodes.label: useAppStore
nodes.summary: Main Zustand hook (create<AppState>) wrapped with immer middleware and persist middleware.

nodes.label: AppState
nodes.summary: Master state shape: settings, products, customers, karigars, karigarBatches, silverTransactions, orders, hisaabEntries, expenses, additionalRevenues, givenItems, soldProducts, activityLog, printHistory, cart, generatedInvoices + loading/error/loaded flags + ~70 action signatures.

nodes.label: calculateProductPrice
nodes.summary: Public helper computing a product's selling price using current rates. Wraps internal cost calc.

nodes.label: calculateProductCosts
nodes.summary: Public exported wrapper that returns full cost breakdown.

nodes.label: _calculateProductCostsInternal
nodes.summary: Core pricing logic: handles silver flat rate, gold/platinum/palladium with karat, wastage, making/diamond/stone/misc charges, custom-price override, gold-coin special-case.

nodes.label: _calculateSingleMetalCost
nodes.summary: Computes cost for one metal type (gold by karat, palladium, platinum, silver) given weight + rates.

nodes.label: _getRateForKarat
nodes.summary: Looks up gold rate for given karat from settings rates.

nodes.label: deleteCollection
nodes.summary: Batched deletion of all docs in a Firestore collection (500/batch).

nodes.label: selectCartDetails
nodes.summary: Enriches cart items with current totalPrice/lineItemTotal.

nodes.label: selectCartSubtotal
nodes.summary: Sums lineItemTotal across cart.

nodes.label: selectCategoryTitleById
nodes.summary: Returns category title for an id.

nodes.label: selectProductWithCosts
nodes.summary: Returns product enriched with cost breakdown.

nodes.label: createDataLoader
nodes.summary: Factory creating Firestore onSnapshot listeners that mirror a collection into store state with loading/error flags and retry/backoff.

nodes.label: loadSettings
nodes.summary: Loads global app_settings/global doc into state.

nodes.label: updateSettings
nodes.summary: Persists partial Settings update to Firestore.

nodes.label: addCategory
nodes.summary: Local-only category add.

nodes.label: addProduct
nodes.summary: Generates SKU (category-prefixed) and writes new product to Firestore.

nodes.label: deleteLatestProducts
nodes.summary: Bulk delete most-recent N products.

nodes.label: reAddSoldProductToInventory
nodes.summary: Reverses a sale by moving sold_products doc back to products.

nodes.label: mergeCustomers
nodes.summary: Merges two customer records, reassigning related docs.

nodes.label: closeKarigarBatch
nodes.summary: Closes an open karigar batch with closedDate and totalPaid.

nodes.label: loadCartFromInvoice
nodes.summary: Reloads cart from an existing invoice for editing.

nodes.label: generateInvoice
nodes.summary: Creates an invoice from current cart, writes to Firestore, updates customer/hisaab, moves products to sold_products. Supports edit-existing.

nodes.label: updateInvoicePayment
nodes.summary: Records a payment on invoice and updates outstanding balance.

nodes.label: syncHisaabOutstandingBalances
nodes.summary: Reconciles invoice outstanding balances against hisaab entries.

nodes.label: addOrder
nodes.summary: Creates a new order and notifies via /api/notifications/send.

nodes.label: updateOrderStatus
nodes.summary: Changes order status; triggers notification fetch.

nodes.label: generateInvoiceFromOrder
nodes.summary: Converts a finalized order to an invoice.

nodes.label: recordOrderAdvance
nodes.summary: Adds an advance payment to an order.

nodes.label: addPrintHistory
nodes.summary: Local-only: tracks last-print timestamps for SKUs.

nodes.label: Settings
nodes.summary: Global settings: gold/silver/platinum/palladium rates, shop info, invoice/order counters, allowed devices, payment methods.

nodes.label: src/types/vcard-parser.d.ts
nodes.summary: Ambient type-decl shim for the vcard-parser npm module.

links.detail: Both implement notification delivery; scheduler likely uses sendWhatsAppMessage
Zebra printer config UI in src/app/settings/printer/page.tsx
Entity forms use shared form provider
UI sync hook complements server-side gold-update lib (both gold-rate domain)
updateSettings persists to Firestore via store
store uses firestore db from firebase.ts
creates hisaab entries when invoice has outstanding
